<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Fiddle-Leaf Fig](images/25-fiddle-leaf-fig.jpg)

The plant that fills a corner without trying to take over. Big violin-shaped leaves, growth measured in months not weeks. Worth the slight fussiness in care.

## What's in it

- Ficus lyrata in your selected size
- Stake (for the larger sizes)
- Care card

## Care

Bright indirect light, water when the top 5 cm of soil dries out. Don't move it once it's settled — leaf drop follows relocation.
